a:r.a:t: Synthetic monitoring continues as production baseline
AI-assisted incident triage, enrichment, RCA summary, resolver recommendation
Observability and anomaly detection across logs, metrics, traces, and service signals
AI accelerates incident triage and detects backend/platform anomalies using logs, telemetry, incident history, and knowledge base.
Month 8 milestone: Full fleet report + Phase 4 scoping.
Synthetic monitoring — Olive Garden order flow
AI triage, Remedy ticket, Teams, xMatters
AI detects, validates, and creates/drafts incidents for Olive Garden order-flow failures before customer impact grows.
Week 6 milestone: Go / No-Go decision + POC debrief with Darden L1 team.
Synthetic monitoring across all brands and key customer journeys
UC1 scales from Olive Garden order flow to all brands, selected locations, and key journeys such as order, waitlist, reservation, cart, and checkout.
Week 18 milestone: Phase 2 review + L1 adoption report.
Synthetic monitoring model tuning and expanded coverage
Knowledge graph writeback and improved RCA learning
Google Analytics, Quantum Metric, and business-funnel intelligence
AI automates repeatable L1 tasks while improving knowledge learning, anomaly intelligence, and business-impact signals.
Ongoing: Quarterly model improvement cycles + L1 Agent health reviews.
Synthetic Monitoring Across All 11 Darden Brands
